info.title: Ecommerce-buildTime
info.description: Ecommerce-buildTime API provides endpoints to manage products, orders, and users for a modern ecommerce platform. Use this API to create, update, and retrieve resources efficiently.

post.description: Registers a new user with required profile and account information. Duplicate email addresses or invalid data will cause request failure. Returns the created user profile on success.

requestBody.description: Payload for user registration. Includes user details such as name, email, phone, country, and credentials.

200.description: User registration successful. Returns the created user profile.

400.description: Invalid user registration request due to missing or invalid data.

409.description: A user with this email already exists.

example.message: User already exists with this email address

500.description: Unexpected server error while registering user.

post.description: Creates a new order for the specified user, processing their current cart and generating an order record. Returns full order details upon success.

200.description: Order created successfully. Contains order summary and line items.

404.description: User not found or cart empty.

example.message: No such user or cart is empty

400.description: Invalid order request: missing cart or invalid cart state.

example.message: Cart is empty or invalid items

get.summary: Get details for a specific order
get.description: Retrieves comprehensive information for a given order by orderId. Fails with a 404 if not found.

404.description: Order not found for the given orderId.

example.message: No order found for the given orderId

500.description: Error retrieving the order due to server failure.

post.summary: Add an item to the cart
post.description: Adds a product and specified quantity to the user's cart. Product and quantity must be available in inventory.

requestBody.description: Details about the product and quantity to add to cart.

200.description: Item successfully added to cart, returns updated cart state.

400.description: Invalid cart input (e.g. missing product, non-positive quantity, or out-of-stock).

500.description: Unexpected error while adding item to cart.

get.description: Retrieves the current state of the user's cart including all items, pricing, and discounts.

200.description: Returns the user's cart details and summary.

404.description: No cart found for the specified user.

details.issue: User does not exist or no cart

get.summary: Track shipping status for an order
get.description: Retrieves current shipment status and tracking information for the specified orderId.

200.description: Returns tracking status and courier info.

404.description: No shipment or tracking info found for the order.

example.message: Order not yet shipped or tracking unavailable

post.description: Registers a product for sale in the catalog with full details; requires all required fields. Product name and brand must be unique.

requestBody.description: Product attributes such as name, brand, category, price, and stock for new registration.

example.name: Samsung Galaxy S24
example.description: Latest smartphone from Samsung with high-end features

400.description: Input is missing required fields or contains invalid data.

409.description: Product with same name or brand already exists.

example.message: Product already exists for the given name and brand

500.description: Failed to create product due to server error.

post.description: Webhook endpoint to receive notification from payment gateway about payment completion, failure, or charge status changes.

requestBody.description: Payload sent by payment gateway with transaction status and identifiers.

400.description: Webhook request is invalid or missing required fields.

post.description: Creates a new payment request for an order. Returns a payment reference and initial status on success.

requestBody.description: Details of the payment including order reference, amount, currency, and method.

402.description: Payment required: insufficient funds or declined by issuer.

400.description: Invalid payment initiation request (e.g. missing fields or invalid order).

example.message: Unable to connect to payment gateway

gatewayResponse.description: The gateway's full response payload as a string or encoded JSON.

transactionId.description: Gateway-assigned identifier for the payment transaction.

payment_webhook.description: Schema representing a payment webhook notification from the payment gateway.

createdAt.description: Order creation timestamp in ISO 8601 format.

totalDiscount.description: Total discount applied to the order.

userId.description: ID of the user who placed the order.

payableAmount.description: Amount to be paid after discounts.

paymentStatus.description: The payment status of the order.

order_response.description: Response containing details of an order.

active.description: Whether the user account is active.

user_response.description: Response object containing user's profile data.

available.description: Whether product is available for sale.

description.example: Latest smartphone from Samsung with high-end features

product_request.description: Request schema for creating/updating a product.

example.name: Samsung Galaxy S24
example.description: Latest smartphone from Samsung with high-end features

order_item.description: Details of a single item within an order.

quantity.description: Quantity of this product in the cart.

cart_item.description: Details of a single item added to cart.

lastUpdated.description: Date/time when tracking was last updated.

courierPartner.description: The shipping courier handling the order.

trackingId.description: Tracking identifier issued by the courier.

tracking_response.description: Shipment tracking status for an order.

totalAmount.description: Total amount in the cart before discounts.

totalDiscount.description: Total discount for all cart items.

userId.description: ID of the cart account owner.

items.description: All items currently in the cart.

payableAmount.description: Total amount to be paid after discounts.

updatedAt.description: Last timestamp when the cart was updated.

cart_response.description: Cart summary and details for a user.

orderId.description: Identifier for the order being paid for.

payment_request.description: Request payload for initiating a payment.

country.description: Country of residence for the user.

userType.description: The user type, e.g., CUSTOMER, ADMIN.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the payment was processed.

currency.description: Currency in which payment was made.

transactionId.description: Transaction ID provided by the payment gateway.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the product was created.

updatedAt.description: When the product details were last updated.

path.description: API path that caused the error.

issue.description: Reason for the error in this field.
